programmes.show_description: Hometown Inspiration. Guy Fieri heads to Portland, Oregon, to visit a spot putting a vegan spin on Israeli flavours. Plus, Louisiana specialities are on the menu in Logan, Utah. S31, Ep11
Beef, Lamb And Pig. Guy Fieri hunts down meaty favourites in Kentucky and North Carolina. He enjoys an Irish pub's cottage pie, Asian-barbecue fusion and pimento-topped burgers. S26, Ep5
North Carolina. Adam visits the North Carolina Triangle, chowing down on chicken biscuit sandwiches and whole-hog barbecue before tackling a hot dog eating challenge. S1, Ep17
Nashville, TN. Casey Webb heads to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet - three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce. S2, Ep14
Surf 'n' Turf Jackpot. Guy Fieri checks out surf and turf eateries from Mississippi to Hawaii. He visits a BBQ joint and a poke palace serving fish caught by the owner. S15, Ep4
Goin' The Extra Mile. Guy Fieri visits food joints big on comfort foods. In Chicago a burger place has Asian flair and in Hawaii a gas station joint does kalua pork and mahi mahi! S15, Ep2
Ballet And South African Biltong. Buddy is tasked an odd request - baking a South African biltong cake! Meanwhile, the team works on music box-themed cake that gets them dancing. S9, Ep9
25 Years And Counting. Mauro and Madeline celebrate their 25th anniversary, so Buddy and Mauro recreate Buddy Snr's original wedding cake - and Mauro's son takes on best man duties. S9, Ep10
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Munich. Paul Hollywood is in Munich to discover traditional German baking. He learns the secret behind Munich's pretzels, he tries Baumkuchen and makes a dampfnudel dessert. S1, Ep10
Best Of Bakes. From babka and Caprese cake to empanada pie and cheesecake brownie, Paul Hollywood looks back over some of his favourite City Bakes he created on his visits. S1, Ep11
Mainland Spain. In Valencia, the bikers explore the Moorish influence on the cuisine of Spain before heading to Torremolinos to try some of the country's best tapas. S1, Ep6
Quick And Easy: Ranch Cookout. Ree Drummond puts together a tasty ranch-style cookout. Dishes include Caribbean burgers with mango slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma! S23, Ep3
Quick And Easy: Chicken. Ree Drummond whips up four quick and easy chicken dinners. Her creations include peanut chicken pasta and chicken nugget bacon ranch club. S23, Ep4
Naples. Jamie seeks out family recipes in Naples, the pizza capital of Italy. And, he tries a seriously naughty street-food snack that is said to predate the modern pizza. S1, Ep3
Basilicata. Jamie Oliver searches for old-school Italian recipes in the breath-taking region of Basilicata. Plus, he cooks a delicious spicy sausage and sweet pepper pasta. S1, Ep4
School Today. Ina is both a teacher and a student as she holds a cookery class. She teaches how to make banana cake and blueberry muffins. Then, she asks experts some questions! S6, Ep9
Baby's First Bash. Ina makes a celebratory meal for the arrival of her friend's new son. She makes truffle popcorn, spicy turkey meatballs and then they eat s'mores by the firepit. S6, Ep10
Biscuits & Traybakes. Almost halfway through, the remaining eight bakers are faced with biscuits- and the Signature Challenge requires them to produce their favourite traybake. S4, Ep5
Sweet Dough. It is week six in the tent and time for sweet dough week - but will it prove bittersweet for the bakers? They kick off with a signature tea loaf. S4, Ep6
James' adventure takes him to the magical lakeside town of Annecy, where he creates delicious dishes using the local tomatoes, red mullet and lobster. S1, Ep7
James heads east to the region of Jura where he barbecues duck and uses the apple and pears of a local orchard. Plus, he visits the home of Comte cheese! S1, Ep8
Mainland Spain. In Valencia, the bikers explore the Moorish influence on the cuisine of Spain before heading to Torremolinos to try some of the country's best tapas. S1, Ep6
Quick And Easy: Ranch Cookout. Ree Drummond puts together a tasty ranch-style cookout. Dishes include Caribbean burgers with mango slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma! S23, Ep3
Quick And Easy: Chicken. Ree Drummond whips up four quick and easy chicken dinners. Her creations include peanut chicken pasta and chicken nugget bacon ranch club. S23, Ep4

Sweet Dough. It is week six in the tent and time for sweet dough week - but will it prove bittersweet for the bakers? They kick off with a signature tea loaf. S4, Ep6
Yorkshire Dales. James returns home to his native Yorkshire. He's joined by friend and award-winning chef, Brian Turner as he tries some clay pigeon shooting. S1, Ep11
The Lake District. James's journey brings him to Cumbria. He's joined by top Michelin-starred chef, Clare Smyth, for a leg that includes a trip out on Lake Windermere. S1, Ep12
Southern, Western And North. Guy Fieri checks out Italian in Buffalo, Wyoming, gluten-free Venezuelan in Calgary, Alberta, and a Southern-Caribbean mashup in Memphis, Tennessee. S38, Ep10
From Noodle To Strudel. Guy Fieri hits up some major deliciousness with sweet strudel in Boulder, Colorado, next-level Nepalese in Alberta and killer noodles in Memphis, Tennessee. S38, Ep11
Adam tours the meatiest meals the US has to offer! He heads to North Carolina for some quintessential barbecue and Idaho for mammoth burgers. S1, Ep2
Durham. Adam Richman returns to Durham, North Carolina, for burgers and barbeque, and to recruit a team for the Doughman Challenge: a four-member, food-and-sport relay race. S2, Ep3
Bringin' It Home. Guy visits a family restaurant cooking Italian dishes in California. Then, in North Carolina, he goes to a neighbourhood favourite that serves delicious fish tacos. S9, Ep4
Homegrown And Homemade. In South Carolina, Guy Fieri visits a farmer's market. Plus, in Lackawanna, New York, he tries a lasagne loaded with stuffed peppers at an Italian restaurant. S9, Ep2
Creepy Crawly Cake And Haunted House. It's Halloween and Buddy's eldest son wants a haunted house to match his spooky cake. Carlo's crew create an intricate carved pumpkin cake. S9, Ep11
Dreams Come True. Rapper Fat Joe wants a cake to celebrate his new hit single, and Buddy's design is as good as gold! Plus, the team create a Gingerbread Man-inspired cake. S9, Ep12

Teleshopping.
Jazz. The bikers return to New Orleans, where Simon tries to convince Dave that jazz can be enjoyable. Plus, they cook classic local dishes, including jambalaya and gumbo. S1, Ep5
Lancashire. The Bikers start their northern road trip in Lancashire. They get breakfast at a food truck in the Trough of Bowland before heading to a gastropub famous for their pies. S1, Ep1
Quick And Easy: New Favorites. Ree Drummond decides it's time for out with the old and in with the new. She makes a flank steak and mouth-watering three-cheese waffle hash browns. S23, Ep5
Quick And Easy: Take Five. Ree Drummond makes four meals with just five ingredients. For breakfast she makes a Mexican classic of chilaquiles and a fabulously fast steak for lunch. S23, Ep6
Sicily. Jamie travels to the island of Sicily in search of sensational home-cooked recipes. Plus, he is inspired to cook an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. S1, Ep5
Tuscany. Jamie is in Tuscany to track down the grandmothers who hold the key to the region's farmhouse cooking. And, he makes a beef stew with homemade pappardelle pasta. S1, Ep6
Training Day Dinner. Ina helps serve up a meal for local volunteers. She prepares grilled bread with prosciutto, potato salad, barbecue pork ribs and pear and cranberry crostata. S7, Ep1
Barefoot Bistro. Ina is demystifying French classics including mussel bisque, apricot butter and apple tarts. Plus, she offers useful tips for cooking French cuisine. S7, Ep2
Pastry. With only six bakers left in the tent, the stakes increase as they face the pastry round. The remaining bakers bring the old fashioned suet pudding bang up to date. S4, Ep7
Quarter Final. It is the quarter final and now there are just five bakers left, and they face the challenges of unconventional flours and unusual desserts. S4, Ep8
James travels to Bresse, a region in France he's never visited before. He visits a chicken farm and museum and meets one of his culinary heroes, George Blanc. S1, Ep9
James travels to a region known for its Pinot Noir, Burgundy. He retraces Keith Floyd's visits 30 years ago and stops at the same vineyard for a personal tour. S1, Ep10
Lancashire. The Bikers start their northern road trip in Lancashire. They get breakfast at a food truck in the Trough of Bowland before heading to a gastropub famous for their pies. S1, Ep1

Newark, New Jersey. Casey Webb heads to his home state, New Jersey! He samples an iconic Italian hot dog, a Portuguese pork sandwich and takes part in a taco challenge. S5, Ep5
Brooklyn, New York. Casey Webb's quest takes him to Brooklyn for a barbeque and deli feast. Plus, he samples an Italian seafood staple and takes on a spicy shrimp challenge. S5, Ep6
Honest Mistake Or Foul Play? Adam Sobel seeks to publicly humiliate Matt Jennings, and Marjorie Meek-Bradley calls out elite competitor Mei Lin. S1, Ep6
